mapper.select: SELECT b.*, c.category_name AS category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT b.*, c.category_name AS category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.book_no = #{bookNo} AND b.status = 1

SELECT b.*, c.category_name AS category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id
b.status = 1
AND ( b.book_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND b.category = #{category}
ORDER BY b.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book( book_no, isbn, book_name, author, publisher, category, category_id, total_count, available_count, location, cover_image, description, borrow_count, recommend_flag, status, create_time ) VALUES( #{bookNo}, #{isbn}, #{bookName}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{category}, #{categoryId}, #{totalCount}, #{availableCount}, #{location}, #{coverImage}, #{description}, #{borrowCount}, #{recommendFlag}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET isbn = #{isbn}, book_name = #{bookName}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, category = #{category}, category_id = #{categoryId}, total_count = #{totalCount}, available_count = #{availableCount}, location = #{location}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, description = #{description}, recommend_flag = #{recommendFlag}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count - 1, borrow_count = borrow_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND available_count > 0
UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM book WHERE status = 1
